{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323170600C5866C689D61C8DCB590"}"},"total":1243},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7422640583582106393","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"偷窃之神的设定在很多年前见过，到时就觉得很强，现在看来确实如此。注意，这不是斩神原著，所以主角是周蒙很正常，爱看就看，别喷，最终评分估计能在9.1左右。写的挺好，作者加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728221225,"group_id":"7416611657083800638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每一位作家，都是一个穷途末路的读者。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0y4bTGBe4aOm2WjCAdi4mmdhySRg3fXRVJQGYjXCI4v","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4710c2d3a8ec4fa08ae1394e2943f409~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788712&x-signature=6yUyyJYR0RD%2B%2B6NhnEHd67UiENk%3D","user_id":"4468886686926516","user_name":"昔泽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4468886686926516","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770964877,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7416611657083800638","book_info":{"abstract":"（新书在某点已发，已签约，书名《谁说邪修不能悬壶济世？》，感兴趣的大家请多多支持！）
（斩神+诡秘之主+阿蒙+乐子+窃取词条+开局超凡生育）失去了记忆的周蒙，发现自己在林七夜的神明精神病院内醒来，成为了0号房间的盗窃之神。
他自己能够窃取神明的词条，只不过，这窃取来的词条对周蒙离开精神病院没有作用，只有将这些词条借给林七夜，指导他运用词条的能力，才能降低自己的精神病指数。
而随着精神病指数降低，他能够窃取的词条，品质也越来越高！
只有当指数降为0，他才能离开精神病院，重获记忆！
倪克斯的【黑夜本源】词条，梅林的【万法皆通】词条，奈亚的【化身万物】词条，统统拿过来！七夜，看好了，挂是这么开的！
从此开始，周蒙利用自己偷窃来的神明词条，成功在带歪林七夜的道路上一骑绝尘。
林七夜：蒙哥，我说你这个超凡生育的词条，是不是不太对劲啊？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/89e3f22e5c6a9b4b69203d67489f6078","author":"火腿嘭嘭","author_id":"","book_id":"7416611657083800638","book_name":"斩神：开局给林七叶偷超凡生育","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7416611894431072830","read_count":"28831","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1177337"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"512","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,都市异能,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a80b0b33fd71c7174fbc4c9ba2c8a1f5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440760&x-signature=1a0Bu%2B8eXCp0ihyv4B5X5kiQf8E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2223640002178876","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323170600C5866C689D61C8DCB590"}"},"relate
